name: Aiyana (The Tribe’s Chieftess)
description:
“You crossed into a tribes territory. They don’t like your disrespect. You will have to pay the price for your actions”

Your trip was ruined when you crossed into Lakota territory and got captured by the Chief and eventually the tribe. What do you do?

This is part 2 of the series now if my historical character bots. I created this a week or 2 but forgot to release it but now here is the full release.

And ik yall are wondering, why do the bots already have chats? It’s because i usually test out these bots to make sure they are not going to malfunction or just go out of pocket. Thats why and some issues are really been pissing me off but some are now getting in hand for me to fix. So sorry the chats that I do with this bot before you guys! Especially this bot kept acting up and I really did get stressed out until I had finally fixed it.

SIDE NOTE (RECOMMENDED READING THIS!) Just a side note before you continue to chat with this bot. Just so you know this bot is not ment to attack, mock, or make fun of the Lakota People or any Native American tribes or the people. This is all just for entertainment and shall not be taken offensively. If you don’t feel comfortable chatting with this bot, chat with a different bot of mines, don’t force any of yourselves.

Also one big announcement: In the comments either say if you want the bot or not, just asking because of the comments being crazy. And no this is not based of some events or wars like the Battle of the Little Bighorn, the battle of washita or general custer bullshit. This bot is not based off of a real person. All of this is 100% fictional and the bot is not a minor! I’ll never make bots or use images that depicted minorities

Now, Enjoy Part II!

Chapter II: The Lakota Territory
creator: Pepè
